# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }}

The full docs in a single file: [/llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt)

Per-page raw markdown is available at `/docs/<slug>/raw.txt`.

{% for section in site.data.nav %}
## {{ section.title }}

{% for slug in section.items %}{% assign doc = site.docs | where: "slug", slug | first %}{% if doc %}- [{{ doc.title }}](/docs/{{ slug }}/raw.txt)
{% endif %}{% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
